name: Canyon Road Eggs Benedict
recipeInstructions:
1. Mash 2 avocados and mix with 1 cup mayonnaise, 2 tablespoons lime juice, and Tabasco to taste. Whisk until smooth.
2. Toast the English muffins and split them in half.
3. Place the halves on each plate.
4. Lightly sauté Canadian bacon and top each muffin half with a slice.
5. Poach eggs and place one on each slice of bacon.
6. Drizzle Guacamole Hollandaise sauce over the eggs benedicts.
7. Garnish with black olive slices and pimento.
From: Christmas in New Mexico Posted on GEnie by JUNGLE.BOY, Dec 12, 1992
